message:
fix(http): replace Instant with deterministic Time in h1 server connection state

Use the runtime timer driver (crate::types::Time) instead of
std::time::Instant for connection_age and idle_duration calculations.
This makes HTTP/1.1 connection lifecycle timing deterministic under
replay and avoids non-monotonic clock issues. Methods now accept an
explicit `now` parameter sourced from the timer driver context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
